Third-party and site integration (Jiangxi)

Subpages

None — single page.

Introduction

This section is to be completed. Compatibility with existing equipment, JX line provider, interfaces.

Discussion

Scope

  • Compatible with existing third-party equipment
  • Jiangxi: Kaiyi or similar orange juicing line provider (line build + training)
  • Equipment context: JBT Marel–style citrus processing; feed lines in China → assume interface with Chinese equipment

Interfaces

  • Oranges in from their lines
  • Peels out via their augers
  • Juice to tanks/pumps

Status

Interface points and JX scope TBD.

Recommended figures (contractor clarity)

  • Add figure: Upstream feed interface — orange infeed height/width vs P6 entry tubes.
  • Add figure: Peel + core outfeed — auger mate to JX line hardware.
  • Add figure: Juice + utilities — tank/pump connection example at P6 boundary.
